findings.title: Validator accepts worker nodes that deploy rejects
findings.impact: Any non-empty string in worker_nodes is currently treated as valid, so a config such as ["worker-1"] passes validate_config. The existing deploy paths call util.is_valid_ip(node) before starting or stopping workers, which raises for non-IP hostnames, so validate_config can return success for a config that dscli up/down will reject.
findings.fix: Validate each worker_nodes entry with the same address contract used by deployment, e.g. call util.is_valid_ip for every node and report invalid addresses, or first change the deploy path to support hostnames consistently.
